title: BioMap: Local Vernal Pools
abstract: Vernal pool clusters that support critical breeding habitats within each municipality. View with statewide data. Part of the BioMap Local Components, habitats assessed and prioritized from the perspective of each city and town that provide municipalities and local land trusts with additional information to support local decisions.
organization: Natural Heritage and Endangered Species Program
rights: MassWildlife and the Massachusetts Chapter of The Nature Conservancy (TNC)
constraints: Limitations of use: The legend "NHESP/TNC BioMap" MUST accompany these datalayers on ALL maps. These data layers are intended for conservation planning purposes only and should not be used for regulatory purposes. The NHESP layers designed for regulatory use are produced in the Natural Heritage Atlas and include Priority Habitat and Estimated Habitat.
